title: Chapter 7
content:
Chapter 7: Dessert?

Liam was glad, the date went flawlessly and Rachel couldn’t take her eyes off Liam, especially with a little alcohol in the mix. Liam was impressed by the service quality here and the fact he could get a good view despite it being on the high-end showed this place was versatile.

It wasn’t as occupied as he thought, but this worked out for him because it was a busy weekday for most so they were busy at work or otherwise.

Not him though, he was officially an unemployed individual with an otherwise bleak future after being cheated on and scammed by Sara.

He was a lawyer, he could easily have taken her to court but that would only make a messy situation even messier. After all, what she did wasn’t technically theft considering the card was given to her willingly. Liam had simply forgotten to restrict or take it back amidst the chaos.

However, these weren’t thoughts currently occupying his mind.

[Ding!]

[Transaction Recorded]

[Target: Rachel Kim (Low-Value MILF)]

[Investment: $960 (Upscale experience + strong emotional connection)]

[Base Value: $3,800]

[300% Beginner Bonus Applied]

[Rebate Received: $15,200]

Liam was mesmerized by this, he had managed to make over $20,000 in a day, this shouldn’t be possible. And the bonus showed he had twenty-nine more days to enjoy it.

Liam offered Rachel his arm, and she grabbed it firmly, he could literally smell the pheromones oozing off her skin.

They didn’t say much as they walked to Liam’s car, Liam knew he could screw her brains out here if he wanted to but that might affect everything he had built in terms of emotional satisfaction.

Rachel felt special because he made her feel special, but Liam wasn’t also doing this strictly for his system’s benefit, he did fancy Rachel.

Rachel was built like a goddess and as long as the lust was mutual, it wasn’t Liam taking advantage of her loneliness. If anything, it was Rachel using him to cure it.

"Did you enjoy yourself?" Liam finally broke the silence and Rachel nodded.

"I haven’t felt this way since I was twenty-one..." Rachel added with an embarrassed smile.

"And somehow, you still don’t look a day over it," Liam complimented her.

"Y-Yo-! Stop it!" Rachel was red but the drink in her system clearly gave her more confidence.

"I’m serious, you’re stunning," Liam added but Rachel hadn’t told him her age.

"How old do you think I am?" Rachel finally asked but Liam could easily call out her real age thanks to his system granting him this information.

But why would he pass up this opportunity to stroke her ego and confidence for max emotional satisfaction?

"I would say... hmm..." Liam observed her face for a second too long before leaning in.

"I would say..." He continued but his eyes were focused on her lips, inching closer and closer.

And before she knew it, Liam buried his tongue into her mouth, her lips parting naturally as his right hand caressed her face.

Rachel’s tongue intertwined with his, showing that this was something she wanted.

Liam’s lips soon broke free before looking her into the eyes, her breathing was heavy as hell.

"What was the question again?" Liam asked and Rachel gushed, her heart was pounding.

The tension, and the way Liam wasn’t rushing, he was taking his time to build up the tension.

This only made her want him more and Liam could see it in her eyes.

"Are you ready to leave this place and go back to my place?" Liam asked.

Rachel nodded, still bamboozled by the fact that they had just kissed, Liam loved it.

This was all within twenty-four hours of meeting her, the lobby was far too easy but then again, Liam was a very good-looking man.

He opened the door for Rachel and let her in, before taking his seat, he was done here.

Rachel had generated approximately $24,920, that was more than what he had in his account before meeting her.

And now, he was about to reach the ultimate pinnacle, he was about to blow her back out.

Rachel kept stealing glances at him but they soon reached his house at long last.

Rachel was surprised by how big it was, this place looked very expensive and this was proof this man had a certain level of wealth to be able to live here.

"This way, beautiful," Liam grabbed her hand and guided her through the apartment.

She couldn’t believe her eyes, the house was neat and everything in it was of the finest quality.

Liam helped her sit on the couch, he walked to one of the cabinets to bring out a bottle of wine with two glasses.

"A glass of wine?" Liam asked but Rachel shook her head slowly, but Liam dropped it in front of her in case she changed her mind.

He sat beside her and maintained eye contact, it was hard because of the two melons a few inches below.

"I had a really great time, Rachel," Liam said and Rachel smiled innocently.

"I had a good time as well, Liam," Rachel responded but she couldn’t hold his eyes, she was focused on his lips.

"I told you before that there would be a time you could show me," Liam said, leaning in with a whisper.

But his hands no longer remained off her, he ran his fingers along her plump thighs, her skin was so soft.

"Hmmmpphhh~!" This sound escaped her lips, she was sensitive and frankly, soaked.

She hadn’t been this aroused for so long, not even with her ex-husband.

Liam licked the side of her neck, sending a jolt of electricity throughout her body.

"I want you so bad," Liam whispered before redirecting his attention to her lips.

This was going to be a rather long night and Liam was about to experience the wonders of being with an older woman.
